data.cta_english: Is Mbappe the best forward alive?

segments.voice_english: One forward scored 22 World Cup goals, but many fans still doubt his total legacy.
segments.image_query: glowing gold football trophy night stadium dramatic lighting
segments.subtitle_english: One forward scored 22 World Cup goals, but many fans still doubt his total legacy.
segments.voice_hindi: एक फारवर्ड ने 22 विश्व कप गोल किए, लेकिन कई प्रशंसक अभी भी उसकी कुल विरासत पर संदेह करते हैं।

segments.voice_english: That superstar is Kylian Mbappe, and he became France's top goalscorer with 66 goals.
segments.subtitle_english: That superstar is Kylian Mbappe, and he became France's top goalscorer with 66 goals.
segments.voice_hindi: वह सुपरस्टार किलियन एम्बाप्पे हैं और वह 66 गोल के साथ फ्रांस के शीर्ष गोलस्कोरर बन गए।

segments.voice_english: But his club dominance was even bigger, because he scored 256 goals for PSG.
segments.subtitle_english: But his club dominance was even bigger, because he scored 256 goals for PSG.
segments.voice_hindi: लेकिन उनका क्लब प्रभुत्व और भी बड़ा था, क्योंकि उन्होंने पीएसजी के लिए 256 गोल किये थे।

segments.voice_english: After breaking Paris records, he joined Real Madrid while crossing over 400 career goals.
segments.subtitle_english: After breaking Paris records, he joined Real Madrid while crossing over 400 career goals.
segments.voice_hindi: पेरिस रिकॉर्ड तोड़ने के बाद, वह 400 से अधिक करियर लक्ष्यों को पार करते हुए रियल मैड्रिड में शामिल हो गए।

segments.voice_english: He holds 22 World Cup goals today, so is Mbappe the ultimate goalscoring machine?
segments.subtitle_english: He holds 22 World Cup goals today, so is Mbappe the ultimate goalscoring machine?
segments.voice_hindi: उनके नाम आज विश्व कप में 22 गोल हैं, तो क्या एमबीप्पे सर्वश्रेष्ठ गोल स्कोरिंग मशीन हैं?

data.youtube_title: Mbappe ne 256 Goals thok ke PSG Chhoda! 🤯
title_options: Mbappe ne 256 Goals thok ke PSG Chhoda! 🤯
Mbappe ke 22 World Cup Goals ka Insane Record! 😱
Mbappe ne 400+ Goals thoke, Real Madrid me Aag Lagadi! 🔥
data.description: World Cup me 22 goals aur France ke liye 66 goals thokne ke baad bhi log Mbappe par doubt karte hain! 😳 PSG me 256 goals maar kar all-time top scorer bane aur ab Real Madrid me history likh rahe hain. Kya Mbappe Messi aur Ronaldo ke records tod payega? Comment me apni rai batao! 👇

topic: ‘Gaslit’ – Eni Aluko staunchly defends stance amid Laura Woods and Ian Wright row
key: ‘Gaslit’ – Eni Aluko staunchly defends stance amid Laura Woods and Ian Wright row

data.title_english: Eni Aluko defend stance in Ian Wright feud
data.cta_english: Whose side are you on? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: Explosive drama rocked football broadcasting after Eni Aluko publicly accused Arsenal legend Ian Wright of disrespect.
segments.subtitle_english: Explosive drama rocked football broadcasting after Eni Aluko publicly accused Arsenal legend Ian Wright of disrespect.
segments.voice_hindi: एनी अलुको द्वारा सार्वजनिक रूप से आर्सेनल के दिग्गज इयान राइट पर अनादर का आरोप लगाने के बाद विस्फोटक नाटक ने फुटबॉल प्रसारण को हिलाकर रख दिया।

segments.voice_english: That row exploded further when Aluko claimed Wright should have sacrificed his punditry job for her.
segments.subtitle_english: That row exploded further when Aluko claimed Wright should have sacrificed his punditry job for her.
segments.voice_hindi: यह विवाद तब और बढ़ गया जब अलुको ने दावा किया कि राइट को उसके लिए अपनी पंडिताई की नौकरी का त्याग कर देना चाहिए था।

segments.voice_english: But broadcaster Laura Woods immediately hit back, which turned this punditry debate into a personal feud.
segments.subtitle_english: But broadcaster Laura Woods immediately hit back, which turned this punditry debate into a personal feud.
segments.voice_hindi: लेकिन ब्रॉडकास्टर लौरा वुड्स ने तुरंत पलटवार किया, जिसने इस पंडिताई बहस को व्यक्तिगत झगड़े में बदल दिया।

segments.voice_english: Facing huge public backlash, Aluko released a fresh statement claiming she was firmly being gaslit.
segments.subtitle_english: Facing huge public backlash, Aluko released a fresh statement claiming she was firmly being gaslit.
segments.voice_hindi: भारी सार्वजनिक प्रतिक्रिया का सामना करते हुए, अलुको ने एक ताजा बयान जारी कर दावा किया कि वह दृढ़ता से गैस से जल रही थी।

segments.voice_english: As this bitter debate over male pundits continues, whose side are you on right now?
segments.subtitle_english: As this bitter debate over male pundits continues, whose side are you on right now?
segments.voice_hindi: चूँकि पुरुष पंडितों पर यह कड़वी बहस जारी है, इस समय आप किसके पक्ष में हैं?

data.title_hindi: इयान राइट विवाद में एनी अलुको ने अपने रुख का बचाव किया
data.youtube_title: Ian Wright Par Eni Aluko Ka 1 Shocking Aarop! 🤯
title_options: Ian Wright Par Eni Aluko Ka 1 Shocking Aarop! 🤯
Laura Woods Ne Eni Aluko Ko Diya 1 Munhtod Jawab! 🔥
Ian Wright Se 1 Job Sacrifice Karne Ko Kaha? 😱
data.description: Football punditry me Eni Aluko, Ian Wright aur Laura Woods ke beech ek bada controversy ho gaya hai! 😱 Aluko ne Ian Wright par disrespect ka aarop lagaya aur kaha ki unhe apni job sacrifice karni chahiye thi. Is pure lafeze par aapka kya kehna hai? Comments me batao! ⚽👇
